positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a mystical forest scene at twilight. The central element is a group of glowing, stylized flora and fauna—such as bioluminescent mushrooms, hummingbirds in silhouette, and delicate fox-like spirits—creating a harmonious, central composition. Use strong, deep jewel tones (sapphire blue, amethyst purple, emerald green) accented by pops of warm, ethereal gold and turquoise glow. The style should be highly graphic, clean, vector-inspired, and suitable for screen printing, emphasizing thick black outlines and crisp, flat color blocking with controlled gradients for the glow effects. High contrast is key, making the silhouettes pop against a darker background.
negative: blurry, messy, amateur, low detail, watermark, logo, text, signature, poor anatomy, extra limbs, artifacts, grain, noise
